🔗 Connect Amazon Ads in 4 Steps
1️⃣
Create App
Go to advertising.amazon.com → Tools → API Access → Create Application
2️⃣
Get Credentials
Copy Client ID, Client Secret, and complete OAuth to get Refresh Token
3️⃣
Find Profile ID
